plugin.name: meta-ads
plugin.description: Create, manage, and optimize Facebook and Instagram advertising campaigns using Meta Marketing API
plugin.context: Use for advertising operations across Facebook and Instagram: creating campaigns, managing ad sets and ads, uploading creatives, tracking performance metrics, optimizing budgets, and managing custom audiences. Meta Ads provides unified advertising across both platforms.

get_campaigns.description: List and filter advertising campaigns from your Meta ad account
get_campaigns.usage_context: Use when you need to retrieve campaigns, check campaign status, filter by active/paused state, or list all campaigns for reporting

ad_account_id.description: Your Meta ad account ID (format: act_123456789)

effective_status.description: Filter by effective status (includes inherited status from parent)

limit.description: Maximum number of campaigns to return

output_guidance.success_description: Retrieved campaigns from Meta ad account

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired. Please reconnect in Settings.
common_errors.invalid_account: The ad account ID is invalid or you don't have access to it.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You need 'ads_read' permission to access campaigns.

get_campaign_insights.description: Get performance metrics and insights for a specific campaign
get_campaign_insights.usage_context: Use to analyze campaign performance, track spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, CPA, ROAS, and other key metrics

campaign_id.description: Campaign ID to get insights for

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract campaign ID from campaign object

time_range_start.description: Custom start date (ISO 8601 date, e.g., '2026-03-01'). Overrides date_preset if provided.

time_range_end.description: Custom end date (ISO 8601 date, e.g., '2026-03-18'). Required if time_range_start is provided.

fields.description: Specific metrics to retrieve (default: spend, impressions, clicks, ctr, cpc, cpm)

spend.description: Total amount spent in account currency

impressions.description: Number of times ads were displayed

reach.description: Number of unique people who saw ads

frequency.description: Average number of times each person saw an ad

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.campaign_not_found: The specified campaign was not found or you don't have access.
common_errors.invalid_date_range: The date range is invalid. Ensure time_range_end is after time_range_start.

get_adsets.description: List ad sets within a campaign or ad account
get_adsets.usage_context: Use to retrieve ad sets, check targeting settings, review budgets and schedules, or filter by status

ad_account_id.description: Ad account ID to list ad sets from (format: act_123456789). Required if campaign_id not provided.

campaign_id.description: Campaign ID to list ad sets from. If provided, overrides ad_account_id.

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract campaign ID from campaign object

limit.description: Maximum number of ad sets to return

optimization_goal.description: Optimization goal (e.g., LINK_CLICKS, IMPRESSIONS, REACH, CONVERSIONS)

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.missing_params: Either ad_account_id or campaign_id must be provided.

get_adset_insights.description: Get performance metrics for a specific ad set
get_adset_insights.usage_context: Use to analyze ad set performance, compare targeting effectiveness, track spend and conversions at the ad set level

adset_id.description: Ad set ID to get insights for

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract ad set ID from adset object

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.adset_not_found: The specified ad set was not found.

get_ads.description: List individual ads within an ad set, campaign, or ad account
get_ads.usage_context: Use to retrieve ads, review creative performance, check ad status, or list all active ads

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract ad set ID from adset object
Extract campaign ID from campaign object

limit.description: Maximum number of ads to return

creative.title: 50% Off Summer Sale!
creative.body: Shop now and save big on all summer items

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.missing_params: At least one of ad_account_id, adset_id, or campaign_id must be provided.

get_ad_insights.description: Get performance metrics for a specific ad
get_ad_insights.usage_context: Use to analyze individual ad performance, compare creative effectiveness, identify best-performing ads

ad_id.description: Ad ID to get insights for

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract ad ID from ad object

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.ad_not_found: The specified ad was not found.

create_campaign.description: Create a new advertising campaign in Meta Ads
create_campaign.usage_context: Use when launching new campaigns, setting campaign objectives, and defining high-level campaign settings

special_ad_categories.description: Special ad categories (required for certain industries)

daily_budget.description: Daily budget in cents (e.g., 5000 = $50.00). Mutually exclusive with lifetime_budget.

lifetime_budget.description: Total lifetime budget in cents. Mutually exclusive with daily_budget.

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You need 'ads_management' permission to create campaigns.
common_errors.invalid_budget: Cannot specify both daily_budget and lifetime_budget.
common_errors.invalid_objective: The specified objective is not valid or not available for your account.

update_campaign.description: Update an existing campaign's settings, budget, or status
update_campaign.usage_context: Use to pause/resume campaigns, adjust budgets, or modify campaign settings

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract campaign ID from campaign object

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.campaign_not_found: The specified campaign was not found.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You don't have permission to update this campaign.

get_ad_account.description: Get information about your Meta ad account
get_ad_account.usage_context: Use to retrieve account details, check spending limits, verify account currency and timezone

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.account_not_found: The specified ad account was not found or you don't have access.

create_adset.description: Create a new ad set with targeting, budget, and schedule settings
create_adset.usage_context: Use to define audience targeting, set budgets, configure bid strategies, and schedule ad delivery

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract campaign ID from campaign object

start_time.description: Start time for ad delivery (ISO 8601 timestamp)

end_time.description: End time for ad delivery (ISO 8601 timestamp)

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.campaign_not_found: The specified campaign was not found.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You need 'ads_management' permission to create ad sets.

update_adset.description: Update an existing ad set's settings, budget, targeting, or status
update_adset.usage_context: Use to pause/resume ad sets, adjust budgets, modify targeting, or change bid amounts

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract ad set ID from adset object

targeting.description: Updated targeting specification (see create_adset for format)

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.adset_not_found: The specified ad set was not found.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You don't have permission to update this ad set.

create_ad.description: Create a new ad using an existing ad creative
create_ad.usage_context: Use to launch new ads with specific creatives, headlines, and calls-to-action within an ad set

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract ad set ID from adset object

creative_id.description: Ad creative ID to use for this ad

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract creative ID from ad_creative object

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.adset_not_found: The specified ad set was not found.
common_errors.creative_not_found: The specified creative was not found.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You need 'ads_management' permission to create ads.

upload_image.description: Upload an image to use in ad creatives
upload_image.usage_context: Use to upload product images, promotional graphics, or any visual content for use in ads

image_data.description: Base64-encoded image data or URL to image file

hash.description: Image hash (used for creating ad creatives)

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.invalid_image: The image format is not supported or file size exceeds limit.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You need 'ads_management' permission to upload images.

create_ad_creative.description: Create an ad creative with text, images, and call-to-action
create_ad_creative.usage_context: Use to define ad content including headline, body text, image, link, and call-to-action button

link.description: CTA link (usually same as main link)

x-variable-mapping.description: Extract image hash from uploaded image object

link_data.message: Don't miss our biggest summer sale!
link_data.name: 50% Off Everything

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.invalid_spec: The object_story_spec is invalid or missing required fields.
common_errors.page_not_found: The specified Facebook Page was not found or you don't have access.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You need 'ads_management' permission to create ad creatives.

create_custom_audience.description: Create a custom audience from a customer list
create_custom_audience.usage_context: Use to upload customer emails/phones for targeting, create retargeting audiences, or build lookalike audiences

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You need 'ads_management' permission to create custom audiences.
common_errors.invalid_customer_data: The customer data format is invalid or doesn't meet minimum size requirements.

get_audiences.description: List custom and lookalike audiences from your ad account
get_audiences.usage_context: Use to retrieve available audiences for targeting, check audience sizes, or list saved audiences

limit.description: Maximum number of audiences to return

output_guidance.success_description: Retrieved audiences from Meta ad account

common_errors.auth_failed: Your Meta Ads connection has expired.
common_errors.insufficient_permissions: You need 'ads_read' permission to view audiences.
